description: This file contains service functions for managing announcements in a backend system, including creating, updating, listing, and retrieving announcements, utilizing SQLAlchemy for database interactions.

methods.name: Announcement create_announcement_flow( *, db: AsyncSession, actor_user_id: uuid.UUID, payload: AnnouncementCreateRequest, )
methods.description: Creates a new announcement in the database with provided payload and actor user ID.

methods.name: Announcement update_announcement_flow( *, db: AsyncSession, announcement_id: uuid.UUID, payload: AnnouncementUpdateRequest, )
methods.description: Updates fields of an existing announcement identified by its ID, including publish status.

methods.name: list[Announcement] list_announcements_flow(*, db: AsyncSession, limit: int, offset: int)
methods.description: Returns a list of announcements ordered by pinned status and publication date, with pagination support.

methods.name: Announcement get_announcement_flow(*, db: AsyncSession, announcement_id: uuid.UUID)
methods.description: Retrieves a single announcement by its ID.

ctags.name: create_announcement_flow
ctags.signature: ( *, db: AsyncSession, actor_user_id: uuid.UUID, payload: AnnouncementCreateRequest, )

ctags.name: get_announcement_flow
ctags.pattern: /^async def get_announcement_flow(*, db: AsyncSession, announcement_id: uuid.UUID) -> Announcement/

ctags.name: list_announcements_flow
ctags.pattern: /^async def list_announcements_flow(*, db: AsyncSession, limit: int, offset: int) -> list[Announce/
ctags.signature: (*, db: AsyncSession, limit: int, offset: int)

ctags.name: update_announcement_flow
ctags.signature: ( *, db: AsyncSession, announcement_id: uuid.UUID, payload: AnnouncementUpdateRequest, )
